messages.content: 你好！我是 Claude Code，你的 AI 编程助手。有什么我可以帮你的吗？无论是代码问题、系统配置，还是其他开发相关的事情，随时告诉我。

⚠️ This exception was thrown because the response has a status code of 400 and RequestOptions.validateStatus was configured to throw for this status code.
The status code of 400 has the following meaning: "Client error - the request contains bad syntax or cannot be fulfilled"
Read more about status codes at https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Status
In order to resolve this exception you typically have either to verify and fix your request code or you have to fix the server code.
